name: codebase
description: Codebase understanding, documentation, refactoring, and testing toolkit — project type detection, guided walkthrough, agent-memory generation and synchronization, pattern-based refactoring, and comprehensive test coverage analysis

interface.shortDescription: Understand, document, refactor, and test codebases
interface.longDescription: Use Codebase to detect project type, walk an unfamiliar repository, generate or synchronize project memory such as AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md, plan pattern-driven refactors, and analyze or expand test coverage.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repo and tell me what kind of project it is.
Generate AGENTS.md for this repo and sync any existing CLAUDE.md.
Plan a refactor and identify the test gaps before coding.
